title: Add Real-Time WebSocket Communication to Next.js
summary: Set up real-time bidirectional communication in Next.js using Socket.io with a custom server (self-hosted/Railway/Fly.io) or Pusher/Ably for serverless (Vercel).
declaration: I will set up real-time communication for your Next.js app. Socket.io with a custom server works best for self-hosted, Railway, or Fly.io deployments. For Vercel, Pusher or Ably are the right choice since Vercel serverless functions cannot hold a persistent WebSocket connection. Tell me your deployment target and I will pick the correct approach.
